fix: Change annotation from TechnoClass::onSelect to ProcessAISuperWeaponSelection. IDA confirms this is a GLOBAL function (no class prefix) for AI superweapon targeting logic. TechnoClass::onSelect handles player unit selection, completely different operation.

fix: Change annotation from MovementAI::GetTarget to TechnoClass::GetTarget. IDA confirms TechnoClass member function. MovementAI is a utility namespace, not a class with virtual functions.

fix: Change annotation from CellClass::UpdateThreat to FootClass::updateThreat. FootClass updates threat ratings for mobile units; CellClass manages terrain cells — different class hierarchy branches.
ida_evidence: IDA name: FootClass::updateThreat — FootClass member. CellClass has no threat tracking concept.

fix: Change annotation from TechnoClass::processSpawn to TerrainClass::ProcessSpawnAnim. TerrainClass handles terrain object spawn animations; TechnoClass is for combat units — different class hierarchy branches.
Change annotation from TriggerClass::Enable to Tooltip::Enable. Tooltip is a UI helper; TriggerClass manages map triggers — completely different modules.
ida_evidence: IDA name: Tooltip::Enable — Tooltip UI class.

fix: Change annotation from ShpImage::GetFrameCount to VoxelAnimClass::GetFrameCount. VoxelAnim handles 3D voxel animation; ShpImage handles 2D SHP sprites — different rendering subsystems.

Change annotation from AnimTypeClass::Load2DArt to ObjectTypeClass::Load2DArt. AnimTypeClass inherits Load2DArt from ObjectTypeClass, but the implementation at this address is the base class version, not AnimTypeClass override.
ida_evidence: IDA name: ObjectTypeClass::Load2DArt — base class implementation.

fix: Change annotation from EBolt::SetOwner to SlaveManagerClass::SetOwner. SlaveManager manages slave miners; EBolt is an electric bolt visual effect — completely different entity types.
Change annotation from SuperClass::Grant to SuperClass::StartTimer. Grant() launches the superweapon effect; StartTimer() begins the recharge countdown — different states in superweapon lifecycle.

Change annotation from SuperClass::HasChargeProgressed to SuperClass::AnnounceReady. AnnounceReady triggers EVA notification 'superweapon ready'; HasChargeProgressed checks charge percentage — different operations.
Change annotation from RequestStop to End. End() terminates the lightning storm; RequestStop is a different lifecycle method.
Change annotation from FadeIn to IsActive. IsActive checks if nuke flash is currently visible; FadeIn performs the fade-in transition — different operations.
Change annotation from FadeOut to ProcessEffect. ProcessEffect handles the nuke flash rendering logic; FadeOut is a specific transition — different operations.
Change annotation from Start to DecrementCounter. DecrementCounter counts down the chrono effect duration; Start initializes a new chrono effect — different lifecycle stages.
Change annotation from AudioSettings::LoadINI to KeyboardConfig::LoadINI. KeyboardConfig reads keyboard bindings from INI; AudioSettings reads audio configuration — different config domains.
Change annotation from HasDeferment to IsActive. IsActive checks if lightning storm is currently running; HasDeferment is a separate check for deferred activation.
Change annotation from Active to IsActive. IsActive is the canonical method name used throughout the codebase for state checks.
Change annotation from Process to ProcessTurn. ProcessTurn is the specific siege turn processing method.
Change annotation from MouseOverObject to SD_vt16. SD prefix indicates Superweapon Dialog vtable; this is vtable entry 16, not the MouseOverObject callback.
Change annotation from WriteInt to WriteIntArray. WriteInt writes a single integer; WriteIntArray serializes an array of integers — different signatures and semantics.
